title: The Commander Battles Intensify
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Law, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Tama, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're a navy spy from what I can gather.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whether you want to take Kaido down!! Apapa!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No matter how this war ends...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The winner isn't coming out unscathed!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: How 'bout it? We could team up,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Swoop in and steal victory at the last moment!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Neither of us has a horse in this race after all, there's no point in us going at it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You honestly think I'd trust YOU?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Trust's got nothing to do with it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This arrange-ment would be mutually beneficial for us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ...only come around once in a lifetime!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Stairs between the first and second floor

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hurry!! The fire is spreading fast!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What the heck are you doing?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is Kin'Emon!! I need to find my Allies!! Poo7!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'm an ally!! It's me! Usopp!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: this half of him doesn't have any ears!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: WHO IS THERE!! ANSWER ME!! POO7!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that was... the crescent mark of the rebellion!! Poot!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So I have finally found one of you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I have an urgent request!! Poot!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll go with Hamlet!! You guys stay with Tama!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am in your debt!! You truly are a friend!! Poot!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Man, you just can't get enough of me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There is a passage on the first floor that leads to the attic of the left tower. Poot!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 52 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
